prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2023年最低位次约8948→6296→4345，呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约4600名；2023年基准约4345名。；本省计划2021–2023年均为22人；2026年计划22人，与近年持平，计划无变化对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜未进入前200名，属军事 医学类专门院校，在军医体系内地位突出；抖音热度排名第9（总榜），评价"高热"，综合热度约532万，短视频曝光量大，反映社会关注度高；声誉评价数据缺 失，；该校以临床医学、海军特色医学见长，招生专业以临床医学为核心。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业社 会热度持续偏高，军医大学兼具军籍与医学双重吸引力；本省2026年考生总数约29.9万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约29.7万略有增加，竞争略加剧，呈小幅上升趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、抖音高热反映报考关注度上升、本省考生总数略有 增加等因素，在2023年基准4345名基础上预计竞争继续小幅加剧；预测最低位次约4295名，区间3795–4795名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 8948 → 6296 → 4345, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 4600 places in the past 3 years; the 2023 baseline is about 4345. The provincial enrollment plan was 22 students each year from 2021 to 2023; the 2026 plan is 22 students, consistent with recent years, and the unchanged plan has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main list, it is a specialized military medical university with a prominent position in the military medical system; ranked 9th on Douyin popularity (overall list), rated as 'high heat', with a comprehensive popularity of about 5.32 million, high short video exposure, reflecting high social attention; reputation evaluation data is missing; the university is known for clinical medicine and naval characteristic medicine, with clinical medicine as the core enrollment major.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of medical majors remains relatively high, and military medical universities have dual appeal due to military status and medicine; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase from the total of about 297,000 for physics and history categories in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition, showing a small upward trend.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the high Douyin popularity reflecting increased application attention, and the slight increase in the total number of examinees in the province, competition is expected to continue to intensify slightly based on the 2023 baseline of 4345; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4295, with a range of 3795–4795.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3795–4795, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3795), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine (Senior Clinical Physician).
